case_title: ROSA ANGELA SCHWARTZ VS. 381 TURK C1, LP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,822.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ROSA ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ROSA ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE ATTACHED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ROSA ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ROSA ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 381 TURK C1, LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROSA ANGELA SCHWARTZ IS PRESENT. 381 TURK C1, LP IS PRESENT. REPRESNTED BY MONICA DEQUIS, RESIDENT OPERATIONS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 5/1/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
